title: Convertible Azalea Leaves
description: This mod / data pack allows the player to convert between azalea leaves and flowering azalea leaves in the crafting table.
body:
# About this Pack

This pack allows you to cut the copper door and trapdoor in the stonecutter in its oxidized and waxed variants.

# Other Packs

This is part of a series of packs I have written to help make non-renewable resources renewable within minecraft, as well as improve the crafting experience for the player. They are availbe ala cart so that they can be incorporated as each player desires. Check out the rest below:

- [Balanced Copper Cutting](https://modrinth.com/datapack/balanced-copper-cutting/settings/description)
- [CJ's Balanced Woodcutter](https://modrinth.com/datapack/cjs-balanced-woodcutter)
- [Duplicatable Pottery Sherds](https://modrinth.com/datapack/duplicatable-pottery-sherds)
- [Heavy Core Duplication](https://modrinth.com/datapack/heavy-core-duplication)

Have a request? Let me know in the discord!

# FAQs


### Can I get this for a snapshot version?
YES! I don't normally release snapshot versions online, but if you'd like to get this datapack/mod made for a specific snapshot or maintained for snapshot versions, please join the discord and let me know!

# Join Us in the Root Community

To report bugs, suggest ideas, and follow new data pack and mod development, join us in the [Root Community](https://rootapp.gg/AC2j8mo1jgqeyZuytuRzfA)!
